frame: Border flows (encounters, gotaways) are events; fiscal lifetime NPV requires stock denominators with legal-status and education-mix discipline. Mexico-born ACS ≠ unauthorized; Pew stock ≠ raw ACS.

parameter_claims.notes: Multiply-out verified: sum(weight × cell NPV) = rollup value_total_usd
NOT median; 46.6% <HS at -109k drags mean; 10.2% BA+ at +514k pulls up

parameter_claims.population: ACS POBP=Mexico, NATIVITY=2, ages 25-64, with SIPP donor
parameter_claims.notes: Self-reported birthplace; includes LPR, naturalized, unauthorized

parameter_claims.population: unauthorized immigrants born in Mexico, July 2023

parameter_claims.notes: 10.5M → 14.0M; largest 2-year increase in 30+ years of Pew series
NOT unique individuals; SW border ~8.72M of this total
Detected only; overlaps with later encounters; not additive to stock without outflow model
vs ~2.5M total SW encounters same year; recidivist avg 2.81 encounters
Restrictionist source; +5.6M from Jan 2021 (10.2M). Upper band vs Pew 14M Jul 2023

parameter_claims.page_ref: SSA SSB v85n2; Passel methodology PDF
parameter_claims.notes: Recent arrivals ~12%; long-term ~2%. Pew final stock includes adjustment

parameter_claims.population: Mexico, <HS, YOEP>=2014, ages 25-64 — NOT full stock
parameter_claims.notes: WRONG denominator for lifetime NPV; dividing total NPV by this gives ~$888k/adult nonsense

generators.name: Encounter-event vs unique-person stock separator
generators.prompt: Before any fiscal per-capita from border data: separate CBP encounter events, IDENT unique subjects, gotaways, and Pew/CIS unauthorized stock. Flag when flow denominators hit stock numerators.
generators.retrodiction: Would have blocked '10M illegals since Biden' → lifetime NPV without dedupe and outflow ledger.
generators.negative_space: Encounter count treated as net new US residents

generators.name: Gotaway net-stock sensitivity
generators.prompt: Gotaway sensitivity: add detected gotaways to stock only after subtracting (a) repeat crossers, (b) later apprehensions, (c) voluntary departure/deportation. Never sum gotaways + encounters + Pew stock.
generators.retrodiction: Would have prevented double-counting ~2M gotaways on top of 14M Pew stock.

generators.name: POBP → legal-status subcount mapper
generators.prompt: For origin-specific fiscal cells: map ACS birthplace (POBP) → legal-status subcounts (Pew residual by origin) before labeling 'illegal Mexican' fiscal impact.
generators.retrodiction: Would have separated 8.5M Mexico-born adults from 4.3M Mexico-unauthorized stock.

generators.name: NAS scalar → education-bucket share gate
generators.prompt: Any population-weighted NAS NPV scalar must ship with education-bucket share table and bucket-level NPV; report median-proxy cell (<HS) alongside mean.
generators.retrodiction: Would have blocked '+$46k per Mexican' headline without 47% <HS at -$109k disclosure.
generators.negative_space: Single lifetime scalar for heterogeneous education mix

generators.name: Unauthorized stock band (Pew 14M vs CIS 15.8M)
generators.prompt: Stock band sensitivity: run Mexico fiscal objects under Pew 14M vs CIS 15.8M unauthorized national totals; apply origin-specific Mexico share (~30%) only to unauthorized-layer lines, not NAS education-mix rows.
generators.retrodiction: Would have bounded undercount debate to ~1-2M national band instead of +10M.
generators.negative_space: One unauthorized count from advocacy source applied to all layers
